economic_notes: Nation has multiple business enterprises including construction (Stqo:ya Construction LP), development (Sqewqel Development Corporation LLP), gas bar (Sqewqel Gas Bar LLP), and forestry (Seabird Island Forestry LP). Earnings from investment in Nation business entities were $6,674,640 in 2024. Stqo:ya Construction LP had total revenue of $21,427,468; Sqewqel Development Corporation LLP had revenue of $6,440,827; Sqewqel Gas Bar LLP had revenue of $4,991,780.
notes: Administration segment shows negative expenses of -$353,707 (likely due to internal recoveries or allocations). Tangible capital assets net book value not extractable from text provided (Schedule 1 referenced but not included). Accumulated surplus per statement of operations is $101,852,966 but Note 13 shows $101,942,485 due to inclusion of remeasurement gains and Ottawa Trust Funds. Seven GBEs accounted for by modified equity method including 3 holding companies and 4 partnerships. Five entities fully consolidated including Seabird Education Society, Seabird Island Holdings Ltd., 1456104 B.C. Ltd., Sqewqel Construction Corporation, and Seabird Housing Society. Large increase in deferred revenue ($5,901,992 vs prior year $939,231). Capital purchases of $12,843,522 represent significant increase from prior year $1,350,117. Total government transfers calculated as: ISC $13,625,640 + Other Federal $9,774,946 + FNHA $8,193,014 + BC $6,891,551 + FNESC $1,835,873 + Sto:lo Nation $536,184 + CMHC $2,482,977 + pension contributions $644,094 not included in transfers = $53,339,185 approx. OSR includes economic activity/other income, rental income, investment income, and earnings from business entities.
